# GoSirat - Safe School Transportation Platform

## Overview
GoSirat is a smart, safe, and transparent school transportation platform designed to connect parents, schools, and drivers. Our mission is to ensure child safety through verified drivers, live GPS tracking, and real-time notifications.

## Key Features
- **For Parents**: Live GPS tracking, real-time push notifications for pickup/drop-off, QR code child verification, and absence management.
- **For Schools**: Complete fleet management, route optimization, driver verification, and instant communication with parents.
- **For Drivers**: Optimized routing, earning opportunities, Green score bonuses, and verified pickup/drop-off workflows.

## Safety Measures
- 100% Verified Drivers with thorough background checks.
- QR code scanning for secure student handovers.
- SOS Emergency features and live ride tracking.

## Contact & Support
- Email: support@gosirat.com
- App Availability: iOS App Store and Google Play Store
